what_it_does: Defines an SVG expand icon made from four L-shaped corner strokes inside a 24 by 24 viewBox.
observations: The SVG uses no fill and strokes with currentColor.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round caps and round joins.
A single path draws corner marks at the top-left, top-right, bottom-left, and bottom-right.
standouts: The icon inherits color from currentColor.
All visible geometry is encoded in one path element.
conventions: Uses line-based icon styling with rounded stroke endings.
Keeps the asset as standalone inline SVG markup.
concerns: The single path combines four corner marks, so individual corner edits are less isolated.
notes: This file is a compact color-inheriting expand icon drawn as four outward corner marks.
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates an expand icon, and the SVG content depicts expansion-style corner marks.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable expand/fullscreen-style UI icon that adapts to surrounding text or icon color.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable expand icon substrate with simple stroke geometry and no external dependencies.
summary_for_embedding: A standalone 24x24 SVG expand icon using currentColor strokes and one path to draw four L-shaped corner marks.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing an expand or fullscreen action in a design system icon set.
